name: sales_overview
SQL: CREATE VIEW sales_overview AS SELECT order_date, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS transaction_count FROM blinkit_orders;

name: customer_order_counts
SQL: CREATE VIEW customer_order_counts AS SELECT customer_id, COUNT(order_id) AS total_orders FROM blinkit_orders GROUP BY customer_id;

name: category_co_occurrence
SQL: CREATE VIEW category_co_occurrence AS SELECT category1, category2, COUNT(*) AS co_occurrence FROM (SELECT category AS category1 FROM blinkit_order_items JOIN blinkit_products ON blinkit_order_items.product_id = blinkit_products.product_id WHERE category IN (SELECT category FROM blinkit_order_items JOIN blinkit_products ON blinkit_order_items.product_id = blinkit_products.product_id GROUP BY category) GROUP BY category, order_id UNION SELECT category AS category2 FROM blinkit_order_items JOIN blinkit_products ON blinkit_order_items.product_id = blinkit_products.product_id WHERE category IN (SELECT category FROM blinkit_order_items JOIN blinkit_products ON blinkit_order_items.product_id = blinkit_products.product_id GROUP BY category) GROUP BY category, order_id) GROUP BY category1, category2;

name: payment_category_relationships
SQL: CREATE VIEW payment_category_relationships AS SELECT payment_method, category, SUM(order_total) AS total_order_value, COUNT(customer_id) AS num_customers FROM blinkit_orders JOIN blinkit_order_items ON blinkit_orders.order_id = blinkit_order_items.order_id JOIN blinkit_products ON blinkit_order_items.product_id = blinkit_products.product_id GROUP BY payment_method, category;

name: top_sku_combinations
SQL: CREATE VIEW top_sku_combinations AS SELECT product_id, product_name, SUM(quantity) AS frequency FROM blinkit_order_items JOIN blinkit_products ON blinkit_order_items.product_id = blinkit_products.product_id WHERE category IN (SELECT category FROM blinkit_order_items JOIN blinkit_products ON blinkit_order_items.product_id = blinkit_products.product_id GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) GROUP BY product_id, product_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 20;

name: customer_purchasing_behavior
SQL: CREATE VIEW customer_purchasing_behavior AS SELECT total_orders, avg_order_value, order_total FROM blinkit_customers;
